title: Add info button shell
summary: The info button shell is fully implemented. createInfoButton() and createInfoOverlay() in src/ui/infoOverlay.ts provide a visible info button (fixed bottom-right), overlay toggle on click, three close mechanisms (close button, Escape, backdrop click), and responsive layout for desktop and mobile. All 27 tests pass and the build is clean.

source_files.description: Exports createInfoButton() and createInfoOverlay(). Button shows overlay on click; overlay closes via close button, Escape key, or backdrop click.

CSS for .eavi-info-btn (fixed bottom-right, 44px tap target, frosted glass), .eavi-info-overlay (fixed full viewport, z-index 20, backdrop blur), .eavi-info-panel, .eavi-info-close. Includes prefers-reduced-motion support.
Appends info button and overlay to document.body immediately (no async dependency).

acceptance_criteria_verification.evidence: createInfoButton() creates a fixed-position button with class .eavi-info-btn, positioned bottom-right with z-index 10. Appended to body in main.ts.
Click handler on button calls showOverlay() which sets overlay display to flex. Tested in 'clicking info button shows the overlay'.
Three close mechanisms: close button click, Escape key, backdrop click. All toggle display:none. Test verifies no location access.

acceptance_criteria_verification.criterion: Overlay works on desktop and mobile
acceptance_criteria_verification.evidence: 44px min tap targets for mobile accessibility. Panel width: 90% / max-width 28rem for responsive layout. prefers-reduced-motion disables transitions.

remaining_steps.description: All acceptance criteria are met. Update ticket status to reflect implementation is complete.
